'''âg-z-g''' ('''kagazag''') is an [[Aelaki]] [[Verbs|active verb]] meaning "[[Wikt:volplane|volplane]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| g-z-g
|-
! Word class
| [[Active verb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:volplane|volplane]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| âg-z-g
|-
! Lemma
| kagazag
|}

== [[Agent]] agreement paradigm ==
''Base present, no evidential.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:thigazag|thigazag]] || [[word:jigazag|jigazag]] || [[word:shigazag|shigazag]] || [[word:kigazag|kigazag]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:thuthugazag|thuthugazag]] || [[word:jujugazag|jujugazag]] || [[word:shushugazag|shushugazag]] || [[word:kukugazag|kukugazag]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:thugazag|thugazag]] || [[word:jugazag|jugazag]] || [[word:shugazag|shugazag]] || [[word:kugazag|kugazag]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:thugazag|thugazag]] || [[word:jugazag|jugazag]] || [[word:shugazag|shugazag]] || [[word:kugazag|kugazag]]
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:thegazag|thegazag]] || [[word:jegazag|jegazag]] || [[word:shegazag|shegazag]] || [[word:kegazag|kegazag]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:thothogazag|thothogazag]] || [[word:jojogazag|jojogazag]] || [[word:shoshogazag|shoshogazag]] || [[word:kokogazag|kokogazag]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:thogazag|thogazag]] || [[word:jogazag|jogazag]] || [[word:shogazag|shogazag]] || [[word:kogazag|kogazag]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:thogazag|thogazag]] || [[word:jogazag|jogazag]] || [[word:shogazag|shogazag]] || [[word:kogazag|kogazag]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:thĂŠgazag|thĂŠgazag]] || [[word:jĂŠgazag|jĂŠgazag]] || [[word:shĂŠgazag|shĂŠgazag]] || [[word:kĂŠgazag|kĂŠgazag]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:thathagazag|thathagazag]] || [[word:jajagazag|jajagazag]] || [[word:shashagazag|shashagazag]] || [[word:kakagazag|kakagazag]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:thagazag|thagazag]] || [[word:jagazag|jagazag]] || [[word:shagazag|shagazag]] || [[word:kagazag|kagazag]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:thagazag|thagazag]] || [[word:jagazag|jagazag]] || [[word:shagazag|shagazag]] || [[word:kagazag|kagazag]]
|}

== Evidential and TAM forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[active]].none || [[word:shagazag|shagazag]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].none || [[word:goshagazag|goshagazag]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].none || [[word:gokishagazag|gokishagazag]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]] || [[word:shagazagnĂŒ|shagazagnĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]] || [[word:goshagazagnknĂŒ|goshagazagnknĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]] || [[word:gokishagazagnĂŒ|gokishagazagnĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:shagazagshĂ«|shagazagshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:goshagazagnkshĂ«|goshagazagnkshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokishagazagshĂ«|gokishagazagshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:shagazagro|shagazagro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshagazagnkro|goshagazagnkro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishagazagro|gokishagazagro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]] || [[word:shagazagmu|shagazagmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]] || [[word:goshagazagnkmu|goshagazagnkmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishagazagmu|gokishagazagmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[mythical]] || [[word:shagazagsher|shagazagsher]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[mythical]] || [[word:goshagazagnksher|goshagazagnksher]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[mythical]] || [[word:gokishagazagsher|gokishagazagsher]]
|-
| [[active]].[[intention]] || [[word:shagazagng|shagazagng]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[intention]] || [[word:goshagazagnkng|goshagazagnkng]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[intention]] || [[word:gokishagazagng|gokishagazagng]]
|-
| [[active]].[[optative]] || [[word:shagazagya|shagazagya]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[optative]] || [[word:goshagazagnkya|goshagazagnkya]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[optative]] || [[word:gokishagazagya|gokishagazagya]]
|-
| [[active]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:shagazagyam|shagazagyam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:goshagazagnkyam|goshagazagnkyam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:gokishagazagyam|gokishagazagyam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:shagazagnĂŒshĂ«|shagazagnĂŒshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:goshagazagnknĂŒshĂ«|goshagazagnknĂŒshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokishagazagnĂŒshĂ«|gokishagazagnĂŒshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:shagazagnĂŒro|shagazagnĂŒro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshagazagnknĂŒro|goshagazagnknĂŒro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishagazagnĂŒro|gokishagazagnĂŒro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shagazagnĂŒmu|shagazagnĂŒmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshagazagnknĂŒmu|goshagazagnknĂŒmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishagazagnĂŒmu|gokishagazagnĂŒmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:shagazagshĂ«nĂŒ|shagazagshĂ«nĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:goshagazagnkshĂ«nĂŒ|goshagazagnkshĂ«nĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokishagazagshĂ«nĂŒ|gokishagazagshĂ«nĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:shagazagshĂ«ro|shagazagshĂ«ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshagazagnkshĂ«ro|goshagazagnkshĂ«ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishagazagshĂ«ro|gokishagazagshĂ«ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shagazagshĂ«mu|shagazagshĂ«mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshagazagnkshĂ«mu|goshagazagnkshĂ«mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishagazagshĂ«mu|gokishagazagshĂ«mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:shagazagronĂŒ|shagazagronĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:goshagazagnkronĂŒ|goshagazagnkronĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokishagazagronĂŒ|gokishagazagronĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:shagazagroshĂ«|shagazagroshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:goshagazagnkroshĂ«|goshagazagnkroshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokishagazagroshĂ«|gokishagazagroshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shagazagromu|shagazagromu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshagazagnkromu|goshagazagnkromu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishagazagromu|gokishagazagromu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:shagazagmunĂŒ|shagazagmunĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:goshagazagnkmunĂŒ|goshagazagnkmunĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokishagazagmunĂŒ|gokishagazagmunĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:shagazagmushĂ«|shagazagmushĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:goshagazagnkmushĂ«|goshagazagnkmushĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokishagazagmushĂ«|gokishagazagmushĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:shagazagmuro|shagazagmuro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshagazagnkmuro|goshagazagnkmuro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishagazagmuro|gokishagazagmuro]]
|}

''63 forms generated.''

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|a6f1c69}}
